message:
feat(validation,sync,storage): harden unicode char counting, tombstone guards, path traversal, and cycle detection

- Switch all length checks (title, label, author, external_ref, comment body) from `.len()` to `.chars().count()` so multi-byte Unicode is counted by codepoint, not byte
- Block manual creation/update to Tombstone status via CLI and MCP; direct users to `br delete` instead
- Zero out closed_at/close_reason/closed_by_session fields when tombstoning an issue in SQLite
- Fix `check_cycle` to correctly handle `waits-for` edge direction and update all call sites to pass dep_type
- Refactor `read_issues_from_jsonl` to use serde streaming deserializer, eliminating manual line-by-line buffering
- Replace fragile single-parent canonicalization with ancestor-walking loop in path validation and sync safety validator; add lexical `..`-escape check in `SyncSafetyValidator`
- Scope backup history deduplication and rotation to matching file stem to prevent cross-export collisions
- Replace `unwrap()` with `expect()` carrying descriptive messages in time parsing and MCP timestamp handling
- Reduce MAX_STDIN_COMMENT_BYTES to 50 KB to match CommentValidator limit

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
